case_title: JILL SUZANNE GOODENOUGH VS. STEE GOURLEY
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER AND JUDGMENT DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED THAT 1. THE PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. 2. THE STAY OF SUSPENSION OF PETITIONER'S LICENSE WILL BE DISSOLVED BUT REIMPOSITION OF THE SUSPENSION WILL BE EFFECTIVE UPON WRITTEN NOTICE BY THE DMV, AND 3. THE COSTS FOR A FILING FEE ARE AWARED AND ARE TO BE PAID TO RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES BY PETITIONER JILL SUZANNE GOODENOUGH FOR REMITTANCE BY RESPONDENT TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS PROVIDED BY G.C. 6103.5. SEE SCANNED DOC.
